## Summary

Describe the problem and the chosen solution.

## Compatibility

- [ ] No user-facing compatibility impact
- [ ] Skel syntax or diagnostics changed
- [ ] CLI behavior changed
- [ ] Generated output changed and consumers must regenerate
- [ ] Public Go API changed

Describe migration or regeneration requirements when applicable.

## Validation

- [ ] Changed Go files were formatted
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes
- [ ] Relevant targeted tests pass
- [ ] `GOWORK=off go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `GOWORK=off go vet ./...` passes when applicable
- [ ] Representative CLI or generation flow was exercised when applicable
- [ ] English and Chinese documentation were updated when applicable
